screen.kmdtravel.drag_hint: Drag the parchment to move the map
screen.kmdtravel.click_hint: Click a discovered marker to travel
screen.kmdtravel.event_prompt_peaceful: You can stop to talk, or continue your journey.
message.kmdtravel.not_discovered: You have not discovered that location.
message.kmdtravel.same_dimension_only: Fast travel is currently limited to this dimension.
message.kmdtravel.already_traveling: You are already in the middle of a journey.
message.kmdtravel.event_skipped: You slip past unnoticed and continue your journey.
message.kmdtravel.event_skip_failed: You are spotted before you can slip away.
event.kmdtravel.bandit_ambush: Your journey is interrupted by an ambush.
event.kmdtravel.night_attack: Something finds you in the dark.
event.kmdtravel.forest_ambush: Movement in the trees turns into an attack.
event.kmdtravel.roadblock: A hostile roadblock stops your journey.
event.kmdtravel.lost_traveler: A lost traveler waves you down beside the road.
event.kmdtravel.roadside_merchant: A roadside merchant shares news of the road.
event.kmdtravel.illager_patrol: An illager patrol blocks the path ahead.
event.kmdtravel.cave_robbers: Robbers rush from a dark roadside cave.
event.kmdtravel.wolf_pack: A hungry wolf pack circles your route.
event.kmdtravel.campfire_travelers: Friendly travelers invite you to rest by their campfire.
event.kmdtravel.herbalist: A wandering herbalist offers road wisdom.
event.kmdtravel.broken_cart: A traveler struggles with a broken cart beside the road.
event.kmdtravel.sea_pirates: Pirates row out of the waves toward you.
event.kmdtravel.drowned_raid: Drowned sailors rise around your route.
event.kmdtravel.shipwrecked_sailor: A shipwrecked sailor calls for help from a small boat.
event.kmdtravel.floating_merchant: A floating merchant drifts alongside your journey.
event.kmdtravel.message_in_a_bottle: A sealed bottle bobs in the waves with a note inside.
command.kmdtravel.distancechance: KMD distance event chance per 1000 blocks: %s
message.kmdtravel.shared_post_crafting_d: Shared Fast Travel Post crafting is disabled on this server.
tooltip.kmdtravel.travel_post.open: Right-click to open the travel map.
